values.value: [ { "id": "R1-MED", "name": "TOMRA R1 Medium Tunnel", "sku": "TOM-R1-MED", "category": "hardware", "tag": "required", "price": 28000, "desc": "Core RVM unit for medium-volume retail. Dual-stream processing, 1.6m width footprint. Handles cans and plastic bottles.", "triggered": ["Medium Tunnel", "Short Tunnel"] }, { "id": "R1-LONG", "name": "TOMRA R1 Long Tunnel", "sku": "TOM-R1-LNG", "category": "hardware", "tag": "required", "price": 38000, "desc": "Extended RVM with integrated crate handling conveyor. Requires minimum 2.4m depth clearance.", "triggered": ["Long Tunnel", "Crates"] }, { "id": "GLASS-MOD", "name": "Glass Acceptance Module", "sku": "TOM-GLASS-01", "category": "hardware", "tag": "addon", "price": 4200, "desc": "Bolt-on glass bottle processing unit with breakage detection and pneumatic compaction.", "triggered": ["Glass Bottles"] }, { "id": "PERF-HV", "name": "High Volume Performance Kit", "sku": "TOM-HV-60", "category": "hardware", "tag": "addon", "price": 3500, "desc": "Upgraded conveyor motors and sorting algorithms enabling throughput up to 60 containers/min.", "triggered": ["High Volume"] }, { "id": "T9-ADD", "name": "Additional T9 Unit", "sku": "TOM-T9-ADD", "category": "hardware", "tag": "addon", "price": 9800, "desc": "Secondary RVM terminal for high-footfall entrances. Mirrors primary unit configuration.", "triggered": ["Additional T9 Unit"] }, { "id": "CAB-MOD", "name": "Additional Cabinet Module", "sku": "TOM-CAB-01", "category": "hardware", "tag": "addon", "price": 2100, "desc": "Modular storage cabinet for compacted material with sensor-based fill level monitoring.", "triggered": ["Additional Cabinet Module"] }, { "id": "DIGITAL", "name": "TOMRA Digital Platform", "sku": "TOM-DIG-SUB", "category": "software", "tag": "software", "price": 1800, "desc": "Annual subscription. Remote monitoring, machine health dashboard, and uptime SLA reporting.", "triggered": ["TOMRA Digital Platform"] }, { "id": "ANALYTICS", "name": "Analytics & Reporting Dashboard", "sku": "TOM-ANA-01", "category": "software", "tag": "software", "price": 1200, "desc": "Consumer behaviour analytics, peak-time heatmaps, and deposit redemption trend reports.", "triggered": ["Analytics & Reporting Dashboard"] }, { "id": "API-PKG", "name": "API / Integration Package", "sku": "TOM-API-01", "category": "software", "tag": "software", "price": 2400, "desc": "RESTful API access for ERP and loyalty system integration. Includes 12-month developer support.", "triggered": ["API / Integration Package"] }, { "id": "INSTALL", "name": "Installation Service", "sku": "TOM-SVC-INST", "category": "service", "tag": "service", "price": 2800, "desc": "Full on-site installation, alignment, commissioning, and first-run validation by certified TOMRA engineers.", "triggered": ["Installation Service"] }, { "id": "LAYOUT", "name": "Store Layout & Design", "sku": "TOM-SVC-LAY", "category": "service", "tag": "service", "price": 1400, "desc": "Space planning consultation including pedestrian flow modelling and signage placement advisory.", "triggered": ["Store Layout & Design"] }, { "id": "TRAINING", "name": "Staff Training Programme", "sku": "TOM-SVC-TRN", "category": "service", "tag": "service", "price": 800, "desc": "Half-day on-site staff training covering operation, basic troubleshooting, and hygiene protocols.", "triggered": ["Staff Training"] }, { "id": "MAINT-B", "name": "Preventive Maintenance — Basic", "sku": "TOM-MAINT-B", "category": "service", "tag": "service", "price": 1600, "desc": "Annual preventive service visit, remote diagnostics, and parts coverage for wear components.", "triggered": ["Preventive Maintenance — Basic"] }, { "id": "MAINT-P", "name": "Preventive Maintenance — Premium", "sku": "TOM-MAINT-P", "category": "service", "tag": "service", "price": 2900, "desc": "Quarterly visits, priority response SLA (4hr), full parts coverage, and loaner unit guarantee.", "triggered": ["Preventive Maintenance — Premium"] }, { "id": "WARRANTY", "name": "Extended Warranty (2yr)", "sku": "TOM-WAR-2Y", "category": "service", "tag": "service", "price": 2200, "desc": "Extends standard 12-month warranty to 36 months covering all mechanical and electronic components.", "triggered": ["Extended Warranty"] } ]
